ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "bbl" TEXT /* Unique Building Block Lot (BBL) identifier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the building is located */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "num_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "units_res" INTEGER /* Number of residential units */,
  "type_2016" TEXT /* Type of building as of 2016 */,
  "lot_area" REAL /* Lot area in square feet */,
  "bldg_area" REAL /* Building area in square feet */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Detailed classification of the building type */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Current occupancy rate of the building */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" INTEGER /* Energy efficiency rating of the building */,
  "water_efficiency_rating" INTEGER /* Water efficiency rating of the building */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building */,
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property manager responsible for the building */,
  "construction_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the construction of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbl")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_metrics" (
  "bbl" TEXT /* Unique Building Block Lot identifier for linkage to the buildings table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of recording the metrics */,
  "eui" REAL /* Energy use intensity (EUI) for the year */,
  "floor_area" REAL /* Floor area for the year in square feet */,
  "water_intensity" REAL /* Water intensity for the year */,
  "naturalgas_use" REAL /* Natural gas usage for the year */,
  "electricity_use" REAL /* Electricity usage for the year */,
  "renewable_energy_use" REAL /* Renewable energy usage for the year */,
  "carbon_emissions" REAL /* Carbon emissions associated with the building's energy consumption */,
  "energy_savings" REAL /* Energy savings compared to the previous year */,
  "water_savings" REAL /* Water savings compared to the previous year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbl", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "bbl" TEXT /* Building Block Lot identifier for linkage to the buildings table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_bbl FOREIGN KEY ("bbl") REFERENCES buildings ("bbl")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city_official, building_manager, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
